src: Face Recognition SDK Flutter(Android, iOS), Face Liveness Detection, Face Landmarks, Face Recognition, Face Liveness, Face Pose, Face Expression, Face attributes, Face Identification, Face Representation, Face Reconstruction
ja: Flutter（Android、iOS）向け顔認識 SDK、顔生体検知、顔ランドマーク、顔認識、顔の生体確認、顔ポーズ推定、表情認識、顔属性解析、顔識別、顔特徴表現、顔復元。
